title: cymbidium × winnianum
intro: Cymbidium × winnianum, also known as the Winniana orchid, is a hybrid plant species within the Cymbidium genus. This orchid is native to the mountainous regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids such as cymarin and cymatrine. Research has shown that Cymbidium × winnianum has various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating respiratory issues and fever. In herbal preparations, Cymbidium × winnianum is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various health conditions.
